name: Ark Suvival Evolved Dedicated Server
description: Dedicated Ark Suvival Evolved server powered by TheFlameBe/arkse-dedicatedserver.

agreement.title: Ark EULA
agreement.text: You must accept the Ark Survival Evolved EULA before creating this server.

composeInline:
version: "3.9"

services:
  ark:
    image: theflamebe/arkse-dedicatedserver:latest
    container_name: vestri-{{SERVER_SLUG}}

    restart: unless-stopped

    ports:
      - "7777:7777/udp"     # Game Port
      - "7778:7778/udp"     # Raw UDP (ARK requirement)
      - "27015:27015/udp"   # Steam Query
    #  - "27020:27020/tcp"   # RCON (optional)

    environment:
      # ===== Server =====
      SESSION_NAME: "DinoWorld"
      MAP_NAME: "TheIsland"
      MAX_PLAYERS: 20

      # ===== Passwords =====
      SERVER_PASSWORD: ""
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ""

      # ===== Ports =====
      GAME_PORT: 7777
      QUERY_PORT: 27015
      #RCON_PORT: 27020

      # ===== Steam =====
      STEAM_BETA: "{{SERVER_SOFTWARE}}"

      STEAM_BETA_PASS: ""

      # ===== Updates =====
      FORCE_UPDATE: "false" 
      # Optional timezone
      TZ: "Europe/Berlin"

    volumes:
      - ./data:/ark

    stop_grace_period: 2m
    stdin_open: true    
    tty: true

    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "/healthcheck.sh"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 2m

    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "3"
